allow: Bash(sqlite3 "C:\\Users\\m1767\\AppData\\Roaming\\Super-Agent-Party\\Super-Agent-Party\\super_agent_party.db" "SELECT json_extract\(data, '$.ttsSettings.engine'\) as engine, json_extract\(data, '$.ttsSettings.base_url'\) as base_url, json_extract\(data, '$.ttsSettings.api_key'\) as api_key, json_extract\(data, '$.ttsSettings.model'\) as model, json_extract\(data, '$.ttsSettings.openaiVoice'\) as voice FROM settings LIMIT 1;")
